originalTitle: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender | Official Movie Trailer | Paramount+ | Avatar
content: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender premieres July 25 on Paramount+. Based on the animated series created by Michael Dante DiMartino and Bryan Konietzko, this new story in the Avatar universe sees Aang learn of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve. Watch More Avatar ➡️ https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3 Welcome to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel – the ultimate home for all things Avatar! Here you will find the best battles, deep dives, and the most memorable moments from all of your favorite characters from Aang to Zuko. On top of that, there will be plenty of Legend of Korra, official Avatar Comics, and even more exciting original content! You don’t need a sky bison to swing on by to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel for all our new videos! Subscribe to join Team Avatar and be the first to get notified of exclusive original content you won’t find anywhere else! Like Paramount+ on Facebook: https://bit.ly/PPlusFacebook Follow Paramount+ on X: https://bit.ly/PPlusOnX Follow Paramount+ on Instagram: https://bit.ly/PPlusInstagram Follow Paramount+ on Threads: https://bit.ly/PPlusThreads Follow Paramount+ on TikTok: https://bit.ly/PPlusTikTok With Paramount+ you can stream over 40,000 episodes and movies from CBS, BET, Comedy Central, MTV, Nickelodeon, Smithsonian Channel, Paramount Pictures, and SHOWTIME® including exclusive originals, live sports, and news. Plus, you can count on Paramount+ for the most iconic movies and the latest in live sports and news with your local CBS station, CBS News, CBS Sports HQ, and Mixible. #AvatarAang #TheLastAirbender #ATLA #ParamountPlus
chineseSummary: 阿凡达传奇 · 3,449,699 次观看
chineseContent: 《阿凡达安昂：最后的气宗》将于 7 月 25 日在 Paramount+ 首映。这部阿凡达宇宙中的新故事改编自迈克尔·但丁·迪马蒂诺和布莱恩·科涅茨科创作的动画系列，安昂了解到一种古老的力量可以拯救他的文化免遭灭绝。在朋友们的帮助下，他开始了一项全球性的探索，在它落入坏人之手并威胁破坏他们牺牲一切所实现的和平之前找到它。观看更多《阿凡达》➡️ https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3 欢迎来到《阿凡达：最后的气宗》频道 - 所有阿凡达的终极家园！在这里，您将找到从 Aang 到 Zuko 等所有您最喜欢的角色的最佳战斗、深入探索和最难忘的时刻。除此之外，还将有大量《科拉传奇》、官方阿凡达漫画，以及更多精彩的原创内容！您不需要天空野牛来观看我们所有新视频的《阿凡达：最后的气宗》频道！订阅即可加入 Team Avatar，并成为第一个收到在其他地方找不到的独家原创内容的通知！在 Facebook 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusFacebook 在 X 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusOnX 在 Instagram 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusInstagram 在 Threads 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusThreads 在 TikTok 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusTikTok 使用 Paramount+，您可以观看来自 CBS、BET、Comedy Central、 MTV、Nickelodeon、Smithsonian Channel、Paramount Pictures 和 SHOWTIME® 包括独家原创内容、现场体育赛事和新闻。此外，您还可以通过 Paramount+ 观看当地 CBS 电台、CBS 新闻、CBS Sports HQ 和 Mixible 的最具标志性的电影以及最新的现场体育和新闻。 #AvatarAang #TheLastAirbender #ATLA #ParamountPlus
